SF_MAGIC_EYE_OF_ENDER.name: Magic Eye of Ender
SF_MAGIC_EYE_OF_ENDER.notes: Requires full Ender Armor Right Click to shoot an Ender Pearl

SF_BROKEN_SPAWNER.name: Broken Spawner
SF_BROKEN_SPAWNER.notes: Fractured, must be repaired in an Ancient Altar

SF_INFERNAL_BONEMEAL.name: Infernal Bonemeal
SF_INFERNAL_BONEMEAL.notes: Speeds up the Growth of Nether Warts as well

SF_TAPE_MEASURE.name: Tape Measure
SF_TAPE_MEASURE.notes: Crouch & Right Click to set an anchor Right Click to measure

SF_GOLD_PAN.name: Gold Pan
SF_GOLD_PAN.notes: Right Click to collect resources from Gravel

SF_NETHER_GOLD_PAN.name: Nether Gold Pan
SF_NETHER_GOLD_PAN.notes: Right Click to collect resources from Soul Sand

SF_REINFORCED_CLOTH.name: Reinforced Cloth
SF_REINFORCED_CLOTH.notes: This cloth has been reinforced with Lead to protect against radioactive substances

SF_ELYTRA_CAP.name: Elytra Cap
SF_ELYTRA_CAP.notes: This helmet will protect you from crashing while flying with an elytra.

SF_FARMER_SHOES.name: Farmer Shoes
SF_FARMER_SHOES.notes: Prevents you from trampling your Crops

SF_INFUSED_MAGNET.name: Infused Magnet
SF_INFUSED_MAGNET.notes: Magical infused Magnets attract nearby Items as long as it is somewhere in your Inventory Hold Shift to pick up nearby Items

SF_RAG.name: Rag
SF_RAG.notes: Level I - Medical Supply Restores 2 Hearts Extinguishes Fire

SF_BANDAGE.name: Bandage
SF_BANDAGE.notes: Level II - Medical Supply Restores 4 Hearts Extinguishes Fire

SF_SPLINT.name: Splint
SF_SPLINT.notes: Level I - Medical Supply Restores 2 Hearts

SF_VITAMINS.name: Vitamins
SF_VITAMINS.notes: Level III - Medical Supply Restores 4 Hearts Extinguishes Fire Cures Poison/Wither/Radiation

SF_MEDICINE.name: Medicine
SF_MEDICINE.notes: Level III - Medical Supply Restores 4 Hearts Extinguishes Fire Cures Poison/Wither/Radiation

SF_MAGICAL_ZOMBIE_PILLS.name: Magical Zombie Pills
SF_MAGICAL_ZOMBIE_PILLS.notes: Right Click a Zombified Villager or a Zombified Piglin to instantly cure it from its curse

SF_FLASK_OF_KNOWLEDGE.name: Flask of Knowledge
SF_FLASK_OF_KNOWLEDGE.notes: Allows you to store some of your Experience in a Bottle Cost: 1 Level

SF_COOLER.name: Cooler
SF_COOLER.notes: Allows you to store Juices/Smoothies and automatically consumes them when you are hungry and you have this in your Inventory Size: 27

SF_FORTUNE_COOKIE.name: Fortune Cookie
SF_FORTUNE_COOKIE.notes: Tells you stuff about your Future :o

SF_SWORD_OF_BEHEADING.name: Sword of Beheading
SF_SWORD_OF_BEHEADING.notes: Beheading II Has a chance to behead Mobs (even a higher chance for Wither Skeletons)

SF_BLADE_OF_VAMPIRES.name: Blade of Vampires
SF_BLADE_OF_VAMPIRES.notes: Life Steal I Everytime you attack something you have a 45% chance to recover 2 Hearts of your Health

SF_EXPLOSIVE_BOW.name: Explosive Bow
SF_EXPLOSIVE_BOW.notes: Any Arrows fired using this Bow will launch hit enemys into the air

SF_ICY_BOW.name: Icy Bow
SF_ICY_BOW.notes: Any Arrows fired using this Bow will prevent hit enemys from moving for 2 seconds

SF_EXPLOSIVE_PICKAXE.name: Explosive Pickaxe
SF_EXPLOSIVE_PICKAXE.notes: Allows you to mine a good bit of Blocks at once... Works with Fortune

SF_EXPLOSIVE_SHOVEL.name: Explosive Shovel
SF_EXPLOSIVE_SHOVEL.notes: Allows you to mine a good bit of diggable Blocks at once...

SF_PICKAXE_OF_THE_SEEKER.name: Pickaxe of the Seeker
SF_PICKAXE_OF_THE_SEEKER.notes: Will always point you to the nearest Ore but might get damaged when doing it Right Click to be pointed to the nearest Ore

SF_PICKAXE_OF_VEIN_MINING.name: Pickaxe of Vein Mining
SF_PICKAXE_OF_VEIN_MINING.notes: This Pickaxe will dig out whole Veins of Ores...

SF_CLIMBING_PICK.name: Climbing Pick
SF_CLIMBING_PICK.notes: Allows you to climb certain surfaces by right-clicking. Enchant this pick with Efficiency to climb even faster!

SF_GLOWSTONE_HELMET.name: Glowstone Helmet
SF_GLOWSTONE_HELMET.notes: Shining like the sun! + Night Vision

SF_GLOWSTONE_CHESTPLATE.name: Glowstone Chestplate
SF_GLOWSTONE_CHESTPLATE.notes: Shining like the sun! + Night Vision

SF_GLOWSTONE_LEGGINGS.name: Glowstone Leggings
SF_GLOWSTONE_LEGGINGS.notes: Shining like the sun! + Night Vision

SF_GLOWSTONE_BOOTS.name: Glowstone Boots
SF_GLOWSTONE_BOOTS.notes: Shining like the sun! + Night Vision

SF_RAINBOW_LEATHER.name: Rainbow Leather
SF_RAINBOW_LEATHER.notes: Can be used to craft rainbow armor

SF_ENDER_BOOTS.name: Ender Boots
SF_ENDER_BOOTS.notes: Sometimes its here, sometimes there! + No Enderpearl Damage

SF_SLIME_BOOTS.name: Slime Boots
SF_SLIME_BOOTS.notes: Bouncy Feeling + Jump Boost + No Fall Damage

SF_HAZMAT_CHESTPLATE.name: Hazmat Suit
SF_HAZMAT_CHESTPLATE.notes: Allows you to walk through fire and lava

SF_SLIME_STEEL_BOOTS.name: Slime Boots
SF_SLIME_STEEL_BOOTS.notes: Reinforced Bouncy Feeling + Jump Boost + No Fall Damage

SF_BOOTS_OF_THE_STOMPER.name: Boots of the Stomper
SF_BOOTS_OF_THE_STOMPER.notes: All Fall Damage you receive will be applied to nearby Mobs/Players + No Fall Damage

SF_BEE_WINGS.name: Bee Wings
SF_BEE_WINGS.notes: Bzzzzzzz Activates Slow falling when approaching the ground

SF_BEE_BOOTS.name: Bee Boots
SF_BEE_BOOTS.notes: Bzzzzzzz + Jump Boost + No Fall Damage

SF_SYNTHETIC_SHULKER_SHELL.name: Synthetic Shulker Shell
SF_SYNTHETIC_SHULKER_SHELL.notes: This item can be used in a workbench like a normal Shulker Shell

SF_DUCT_TAPE.name: Duct Tape
SF_DUCT_TAPE.notes: You can repair Items using this in an Auto-Anvil

SF_SOLAR_PANEL.name: Photovoltaic Cell
SF_SOLAR_PANEL.notes: Important component for crafting a Solar Generator

SF_STRANGE_NETHER_GOO.name: Strange Nether Goo
SF_STRANGE_NETHER_GOO.notes: A strange bio matter that can be acquired from bartering with Piglins

SF_CARGO_MOTOR.name: Cargo Motor
SF_CARGO_MOTOR.notes: Important ingredient for items related to Cargo Management

SF_SCROLL_OF_DIMENSIONAL_TELEPOSITION.name: Scroll of Dimensional Teleposition
SF_SCROLL_OF_DIMENSIONAL_TELEPOSITION.notes: This Scroll is capable of creating a temporary black Hole which pulls nearby Entities into itself and sends them into another Dimension where everything is turned around In other words: Makes Entities turn by 180 Degrees

SF_TOME_OF_KNOWLEDGE_SHARING.name: Tome of Knowledge Sharing
SF_TOME_OF_KNOWLEDGE_SHARING.notes: Owner: None Right Click to bind this Tome to yourself Right Click to obtain all Researches by the previously assigned Owner

SF_ANCIENT_ALTAR.name: Ancient Altar
SF_ANCIENT_ALTAR.notes: Multi-Block Altar for magical Crafting Processes

SF_SYNTHETIC_DIAMOND.name: Synthetic Diamond
SF_SYNTHETIC_DIAMOND.notes: This item can be used in a workbench and acts like a normal Diamond

SF_SYNTHETIC_EMERALD.name: Synthetic Emerald
SF_SYNTHETIC_EMERALD.notes: This item can be used to trade with Villagers

SF_SYNTHETIC_SAPPHIRE.name: Synthetic Sapphire
SF_SYNTHETIC_SAPPHIRE.notes: This item can be used in a workbench and acts like Lapis Lazuli

SF_ANVIL_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Anvil
SF_ANVIL_TALISMAN.notes: Each Talisman can prevent 1 Tool from breaking, but will then be consumed WARNING: This Talisman does not work on Tools which are too powerful due to their complexity

SF_MINER_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Miner
SF_MINER_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it has a 20% chance of doubling all Ores you mine

SF_FARMER_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Farmer
SF_FARMER_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it has a 20% chance of doubling all crops you harvest

SF_HUNTER_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Hunter
SF_HUNTER_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it has a 20% chance of doubling all Drops from Mobs you kill

SF_LAVA_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Lava Walker
SF_LAVA_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it will give you Fire Resistance as soon as you touch Lava but will then be consumed

SF_WATER_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Water Breather
SF_WATER_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it will give you the ability to breath underwater as soon as you start drowning but will then be consumed

SF_ANGEL_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Angel
SF_ANGEL_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it has a 75% chance to prevent you from taking Fall Damage

SF_FIRE_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Firefighter
SF_FIRE_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it will give you Fire Resistance as soon as you start burning but will then be consumed

SF_MAGICIAN_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Magician
SF_MAGICIAN_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it gives you a 80% Luck Bonus on Enchanting You will sometimes get an Extra Enchantment

SF_TRAVELLER_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Traveller
SF_TRAVELLER_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it gives you a 60% Chance for a decent Speed Buff when you start sprinting

SF_WARRIOR_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Warrior
SF_WARRIOR_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it gives you Strength III whenever you get hit but will then be consumed

SF_KNIGHT_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Knight
SF_KNIGHT_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it gives you a 30% Chance for 5 Seconds of Regeneration whenever You get hit but will then be consumed

SF_WHIRLWIND_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Whirlwind
SF_WHIRLWIND_TALISMAN.notes: Having this Talisman in your Inventory will reflect 60% of any projectiles fired at you. Only a thrown Trident can pierce through this layer of protection

SF_WIZARD_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Wizard
SF_WIZARD_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your Inventory it allows you to obtain Fortune Level 4/5 however it also has a chance to lower the Level of some Enchantments on your Item

SF_CAVEMAN_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Caveman
SF_CAVEMAN_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your inventory it gives you a 50% chance for a decent Haste buff when you mine any ore

SF_WISE_TALISMAN.name: Talisman of the Wise
SF_WISE_TALISMAN.notes: While you have this Talisman in your inventory it gives you a 20% chance of doubling any experience you obtain

SF_STAFF_ELEMENTAL_WIND.name: Elemental Staff - Wind
SF_STAFF_ELEMENTAL_WIND.notes: Element: Wind Right Click to launch yourself forward

SF_STAFF_ELEMENTAL_WATER.name: Elemental Staff - Water
SF_STAFF_ELEMENTAL_WATER.notes: Element: Water Right Click to extinguish yourself

SF_STAFF_ELEMENTAL_STORM.name: Elemental Staff - Storm
SF_STAFF_ELEMENTAL_STORM.notes: Element: Storm Right Click to summon a lightning

SF_ENHANCED_CRAFTING_TABLE.name: Enhanced Crafting Table
SF_ENHANCED_CRAFTING_TABLE.notes: A regular Crafting Table cannot hold this massive Amount of Power...

SF_GRIND_STONE.name: Grind Stone
SF_GRIND_STONE.notes: Grinds items down into other items

SF_ARMOR_FORGE.name: Armor Forge
SF_ARMOR_FORGE.notes: Gives you the ability to create powerful armor

SF_MAKESHIFT_SMELTERY.name: Makeshift Smeltery
SF_MAKESHIFT_SMELTERY.notes: Improvised version of the Smeltery that only allows you to smelt dusts into ingots

SF_SMELTERY.name: Smeltery
SF_SMELTERY.notes: A high-temperature furnace that allows you to smelt dusts into ingots and create alloys.

SF_ORE_WASHER.name: Ore Washer
SF_ORE_WASHER.notes: Washes Sifted Ore to filter Ores and gives you small Stone Chunks

SF_TABLE_SAW.name: Table Saw
SF_TABLE_SAW.notes: Allows you to get 8 planks from 1 Log (Works with all log types)

SF_JUICER.name: Juicer
SF_JUICER.notes: Allows you to create delicious Juice

SF_AUTOMATED_PANNING_MACHINE.name: Automated Panning Machine
SF_AUTOMATED_PANNING_MACHINE.notes: A MultiBlock Version of the Gold Pan and Nether Gold Pan combined in one machine.

SF_INDUSTRIAL_MINER.name: Industrial Miner
SF_INDUSTRIAL_MINER.notes: This Multiblock will mine any Ores in a 7x7 area underneath it. Place coal or similar in its chest to fuel this machine.

SF_ADVANCED_INDUSTRIAL_MINER.name: Advanced Industrial Miner
SF_ADVANCED_INDUSTRIAL_MINER.notes: This Multiblock will mine any Ores in a 11x11 area underneath it. Place a bucket of fuel or lava in its chest to fuel this machine. + Silk Touch

SF_COMPOSTER.name: Composter
SF_COMPOSTER.notes: Can convert various Materials over Time...

SF_CRUCIBLE.name: Crucible
SF_CRUCIBLE.notes: Used to smelt Items into Liquids

SF_OUTPUT_CHEST.name: Output Chest
SF_OUTPUT_CHEST.notes: A basic machine will try to put items in this chest if it's placed adjacent to the dispenser.

SF_IGNITION_CHAMBER.name: Automatic Ignition Chamber
SF_IGNITION_CHAMBER.notes: Prevents the Smeltery from using up fire. Just fill it up with \"Flint and Steel\" and place it adjacent to the Smeltery's dispenser

SF_BLOCK_PLACER.name: Block Placer
SF_BLOCK_PLACER.notes: All Blocks in this Dispenser will automatically get placed

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE.name: Enhanced Furnace - I
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE.notes: Processing Speed: 1x Fuel Efficiency: 1x Luck Multiplier: 1x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_2.name: Enhanced Furnace - II
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_2.notes: Processing Speed: 2x Fuel Efficiency: 1x Luck Multiplier: 1x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_3.name: Enhanced Furnace - III
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_3.notes: Processing Speed: 2x Fuel Efficiency: 2x Luck Multiplier: 1x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_4.name: Enhanced Furnace - IV
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_4.notes: Processing Speed: 3x Fuel Efficiency: 2x Luck Multiplier: 1x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_5.name: Enhanced Furnace - V
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_5.notes: Processing Speed: 3x Fuel Efficiency: 2x Luck Multiplier: 2x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_6.name: Enhanced Furnace - VI
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_6.notes: Processing Speed: 3x Fuel Efficiency: 3x Luck Multiplier: 2x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_7.name: Enhanced Furnace - VII
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_7.notes: Processing Speed: 4x Fuel Efficiency: 3x Luck Multiplier: 2x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_8.name: Enhanced Furnace - VIII
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_8.notes: Processing Speed: 4x Fuel Efficiency: 4x Luck Multiplier: 2x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_9.name: Enhanced Furnace - IX
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_9.notes: Processing Speed: 5x Fuel Efficiency: 4x Luck Multiplier: 2x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_10.name: Enhanced Furnace - X
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_10.notes: Processing Speed: 5x Fuel Efficiency: 5x Luck Multiplier: 2x

SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_11.name: Enhanced Furnace - XI
SF_ENHANCED_FURNACE_11.notes: Processing Speed: 5x Fuel Efficiency: 5x Luck Multiplier: 3x

SF_REINFORCED_FURNACE.name: Reinforced Furnace
SF_REINFORCED_FURNACE.notes: Processing Speed: 10x Fuel Efficiency: 10x Luck Multiplier: 3x

SF_CARBONADO_EDGED_FURNACE.name: Carbonado Edged Furnace
SF_CARBONADO_EDGED_FURNACE.notes: Processing Speed: 20x Fuel Efficiency: 10x Luck Multiplier: 3x

SF_ANCIENT_RUNE_SOULBOUND.name: Ancient Rune [Soulbound]
SF_ANCIENT_RUNE_SOULBOUND.notes: Drop this rune onto a dropped item to bind that item to your soul. It is advised that you only use this rune on important items. Items bound to your soul won't drop on death.

SF_ANCIENT_RUNE_ENCHANTMENT.name: Ancient Rune [Enchantment]
SF_ANCIENT_RUNE_ENCHANTMENT.notes: Drop this rune onto a dropped item to enchant that item with a random enchantment.

SF_ANCIENT_RUNE_VILLAGERS.name: Ancient Rune [Villagers]
SF_ANCIENT_RUNE_VILLAGERS.notes: Right click a villager to clear their current job and trades. The villager will start looking for a job again after some time has passed.

SF_ELECTRIC_ORE_GRINDER.name: Electric Ore Grinder
SF_ELECTRIC_ORE_GRINDER.notes: Works as an Ore Crusher and Grind Stone

SF_ELECTRIC_ORE_GRINDER_2.name: Electric Ore Grinder (II)
SF_ELECTRIC_ORE_GRINDER_2.notes: Works as an Ore Crusher and Grind Stone

SF_ELECTRIC_ORE_GRINDER_3.name: Electric Ore Grinder (III)
SF_ELECTRIC_ORE_GRINDER_3.notes: Works as an Ore Crusher and Grind Stone

SF_BOOK_BINDER.name: Book Binder
SF_BOOK_BINDER.notes: Binds multiple enchanted books into one.

SF_MULTIMETER.name: Multimeter
SF_MULTIMETER.notes: Measures the Amount of stored Energy in a Block

SF_PROGRAMMABLE_ANDROID_FISHERMAN.name: Programmable Android (Fisherman)
SF_PROGRAMMABLE_ANDROID_FISHERMAN.notes: ⇨ Function: Fishing ⇨ Success Rate: 10% ⇨ Fuel Efficiency: 1.0x

SF_PROGRAMMABLE_ANDROID_2_FISHERMAN.name: Advanced Programmable Android (Fisherman)
SF_PROGRAMMABLE_ANDROID_2_FISHERMAN.notes: ⇨ Function: Fishing ⇨ Success Rate: 20% ⇨ Fuel Efficiency: 1.5x

SF_PROGRAMMABLE_ANDROID_2_FARMER.name: Advanced Programmable Android (Farmer)
SF_PROGRAMMABLE_ANDROID_2_FARMER.notes: ⇨ Function: Farming ⇨ Fuel Efficiency: 1.5x ⇨ Can also harvest Plants from ExoticGarden

SF_PROGRAMMABLE_ANDROID_3_FISHERMAN.name: Empowered Programmable Android (Fisherman)
SF_PROGRAMMABLE_ANDROID_3_FISHERMAN.notes: ⇨ Function: Fishing ⇨ Success Rate: 30% ⇨ Fuel Efficiency: 8.0x

SF_GPS_MARKER_TOOL.name: GPS Marker Tool
SF_GPS_MARKER_TOOL.notes: Allows you to set a Waypoint at the Location you place this

SF_GPS_CONTROL_PANEL.name: GPS Control Panel
SF_GPS_CONTROL_PANEL.notes: Allows you to track your Satellites and manage your Waypoints

SF_GPS_EMERGENCY_TRANSMITTER.name: GPS Emergency Transmitter
SF_GPS_EMERGENCY_TRANSMITTER.notes: Carrying this in your Inventory automatically sets a Waypoint at your Location when you die.

SF_ANDROID_INTERFACE_FUEL.name: Android Interface (Fuel)
SF_ANDROID_INTERFACE_FUEL.notes: Items stored in this Interface will be inserted into an Android's Fuel Slot when its Script tells them to do so

SF_ANDROID_INTERFACE_ITEMS.name: Android Interface (Items)
SF_ANDROID_INTERFACE_ITEMS.notes: Items stored in an Android's Inventory will be inserted into this Interface when its Script tells them to do so

SF_GPS_GEO_SCANNER.name: GPS Geo-Scanner
SF_GPS_GEO_SCANNER.notes: Scans a Chunk for natural Resources such as Oil

SF_PORTABLE_GEO_SCANNER.name: Portable Geo-Scanner
SF_PORTABLE_GEO_SCANNER.notes: Scans a Chunk for natural Resources Right Click to scan

SF_GEO_MINER.name: GEO Miner
SF_GEO_MINER.notes: Mines up resources from the chunk These Resources cannot be mined with a pickaxe ! Make sure to Geo-Scan the Chunk first

SF_OIL_PUMP.name: Oil Pump
SF_OIL_PUMP.notes: Pumps up Oil and fills it into Buckets ! Make sure to Geo-Scan the Chunk first

SF_GPS_TELEPORTATION_MATRIX.name: GPS Teleporter Matrix
SF_GPS_TELEPORTATION_MATRIX.notes: This is your Teleporter's Main Component This Matrix allows Players to choose from all Waypoints made by the Player who has placed this Device.

SF_GPS_ACTIVATION_DEVICE_SHARED.name: GPS Activation Device (Shared)
SF_GPS_ACTIVATION_DEVICE_SHARED.notes: Place this onto a Teleportation Matrix and step onto this Plate to activate the Teleportation Process

SF_GPS_ACTIVATION_DEVICE_PERSONAL.name: GPS Activation Device (Personal)
SF_GPS_ACTIVATION_DEVICE_PERSONAL.notes: Place this onto a Teleportation Matrix and step onto this Plate to activate the Teleportation Process This Version only allows the Person who placed this Device to use it

SF_PORTABLE_TELEPORTER.name: Portable Teleporter
SF_PORTABLE_TELEPORTER.notes: This device allows you to teleport to your waypoints from anywhere Right Click to use

SF_ELEVATOR_PLATE.name: Elevator Plate
SF_ELEVATOR_PLATE.notes: Place an Elevator Plate on every floor and you will be able to teleport between them. Right Click this Block to name it

SF_INFUSED_HOPPER.name: Infused Hopper
SF_INFUSED_HOPPER.notes: Automatically picks up nearby Items in a 7x7x7 Radius when placed.

SF_ELECTRIC_SMELTERY.name: Electric Smeltery
SF_ELECTRIC_SMELTERY.notes: Alloys-Only, doesn't smelt Dust into Ingots

SF_ELECTRIC_SMELTERY_2.name: Electric Smeltery - II
SF_ELECTRIC_SMELTERY_2.notes: Alloys-Only, doesn't smelt Dust into Ingots

SF_ENERGY_REGULATOR.name: Energy Regulator
SF_ENERGY_REGULATOR.notes: Core Component of an Energy Network

SF_ENERGY_CONNECTOR.name: Energy Connector
SF_ENERGY_CONNECTOR.notes: Place this between machines and generators to connect them to your regulator.

SF_DEBUG_FISH.name: How much is the Fish?
SF_DEBUG_FISH.notes: Right Click any Block to view it's BlockData Left Click to break a Block Shift + Left Click any Block to erase it's BlockData Shift + Right Click to place a Placeholder Block

SF_CARGO_MANAGER.name: Cargo Manager
SF_CARGO_MANAGER.notes: Core Component of an Item Transport Network

SF_PRODUCE_COLLECTOR.name: Produce Collector
SF_PRODUCE_COLLECTOR.notes: This machine allows you to collect produce from nearby animals.

SF_CROP_GROWTH_ACCELERATOR.name: Crop Growth Accelerator
SF_CROP_GROWTH_ACCELERATOR.notes: Runs on Organic Fertilizer ⇨ Radius: 7x7 ⇨ Speed: 3/time

SF_CROP_GROWTH_ACCELERATOR_2.name: Crop Growth Accelerator (II)
SF_CROP_GROWTH_ACCELERATOR_2.notes: Runs on Organic Fertilizer ⇨ Radius: 9x9 ⇨ Speed: 4/time

SF_TREE_GROWTH_ACCELERATOR.name: Tree Growth Accelerator
SF_TREE_GROWTH_ACCELERATOR.notes: Runs on Organic Fertilizer ⇨ Radius: 9x9 ⇨ Speed: 4/time

SF_XP_COLLECTOR.name: EXP Collector
SF_XP_COLLECTOR.notes: Collects nearby Exp and stores it

SF_NUCLEAR_REACTOR.name: Nuclear Reactor
SF_NUCLEAR_REACTOR.notes: Requires Cooling! ⇨ Must be surrounded by Water ⇨ Must be supplied with Reactor Coolant Cells

SF_NETHERSTAR_REACTOR.name: Nether Star Reactor
SF_NETHERSTAR_REACTOR.notes: Runs on Nether Stars ⇨ Must be surrounded by Water ⇨ Must be supplied with Nether Ice Coolant Cells ⇨ Causes nearby Entities to get Withered

SF_REACTOR_ACCESS_PORT.name: Reactor Access Port
SF_REACTOR_ACCESS_PORT.notes: Allows you to interact with a Reactor via Cargo Nodes, can also be used as a Buffer ⇨ Must be placed 3 Blocks above the Reactor

SF_CHARGING_BENCH.name: Charging Bench
SF_CHARGING_BENCH.notes: Charges Items such as Jetpacks ⇨ ⚡ Energy Loss: 50%

SF_VANILLA_AUTO_CRAFTER.name: Auto-Crafter (Vanilla)
SF_VANILLA_AUTO_CRAFTER.notes: Place this machine on top of a chest or similar and make it craft anything that can be crafted using a normal Crafting Table ⇨ ⚡ 16 J/Item

SF_ENHANCED_AUTO_CRAFTER.name: Auto-Crafter (Enhanced)
SF_ENHANCED_AUTO_CRAFTER.notes: Place this machine on top of a chest or similar and make it craft anything that can be crafted using an Enhanced Crafting Table ⇨ ⚡ 16 J/Item

SF_ARMOR_AUTO_CRAFTER.name: Auto-Crafter (Armor Forge)
SF_ARMOR_AUTO_CRAFTER.notes: Place this machine on top of a chest or similar and make it craft anything that can be crafted using an Armor Forge ⇨ ⚡ 32 J/Item

SF_TRASH_CAN_BLOCK.name: Trash Can
SF_TRASH_CAN_BLOCK.notes: Will destroy all Items put into it

SF_MAGNESIUM_SALT.name: Magnesium Salt
SF_MAGNESIUM_SALT.notes: A special type of fuel that can be used in a Magnesium-powered Generator
